version_description: Simplified version and meant for acoustic performances - other chord charts had many notes over words making hard for beginners.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]C9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]C9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
You're on the couch, blowing up my phone[/tab]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
You don't want to come out, but you don't want to be alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
It don't take but two, to have a little soiree[/tab]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
If you're in the mood, sit tight right where you are babe[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]C9[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Cause I'll be at your door in two minutes[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
Whatever you got on baby stay in it[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C9[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
You ain't gotta leave the house to have a good time[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
Imma bring the good time home to you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]C9[/ch]     [ch]C/B[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
We'll have a house party, we don' need nobody[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Turn that TV off, break that boom - box out[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C9[/ch]         [ch]C/B[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
We'll wake up all the neighbors till the whole block hates us[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
Til the cops show up, trying to shut us down[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                        [ch]C9[/ch]    [ch]C/B[/ch]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
If you're going to be a homebody, we gonna have a house party[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C/E[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
If you're going to be a homebody, we gonna have a house party[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]C9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]C9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Throw a neon tee shirt, over the lamp shade[/tab]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
I'll take the furniture, slide it out of the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
Shaking the floor, rattling the roof[/tab]
[tab][ch]C9[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
We'll go to town like they're in your living room[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]C9[/ch]     [ch]C/B[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
We'll have a house party, we don' need nobody[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]C9[/ch]         [ch]C/B[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]C9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]                        [ch]C9[/ch]    [ch]C/B[/ch]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
